---
title: "Hurricanes NOLA: CAREER Project"
author: "Connor Whalen"
date: "2025-02-18"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: readable
    highlight: textmate
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

# Introduction
This file contains all code pertaining to the CAREER project in NOLA's hurricane analysis. 

# Setup
#### Install packages.
```{r package install, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
install.packages("tidyverse")
install.packages("janitor")
install.packages("ggeffects")
install.packages("ggpubr")
install.packages("glmmTMB")
install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("johannesbjork/LaCroixColoR")
install.packages("patchwork")
install.packages("ggh4x")
install.packages("vistime")
install.packages("DHARMa")
install.packages("bbmle")
```

#### Load packages.
```{r package load, echo=FALSE}
library(ggpubr)
library(ggeffects)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(dbplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
#library(lmerTest)
library(lme4)
source("~/Desktop/UW/Dissertation/theme_ctmt.R")
library(LaCroixColoR)
library(patchwork)
library(ggh4x)
library(vistime)
library(car)
library(DHARMa)
library(sjPlot)
library(performance)
library(parameters)
library(tidyverse)
library(corrplot)
library(patchwork)
library(performance)
library(parameters)
library(DHARMa)
library(glmmTMB)
library(bbmle) 
# library(viridis)
library(lmtest)
# library(marginaleffects)
library(DHARMa)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
# library(broom.mixed)

```
#### Load full datasets (parasites collected and NOAA SPI precipitation data) and prep data for analysis
```{r datasets and dataframe loading and general df clean and prep for analysis, echo=FALSE}
full_data <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Full_dataset_physical_2024.09.25.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()

SPI_data <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/SPI data - Sheet1.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()

# Prep all data for analysis, inclduing assigning parasite type categories, abundance and prevalence counts, and establishing correct column date structure
full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(psite_type = case_when(
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACAN") ~ "acanthocephalan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACANTH") ~ "acanthocephalan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CEST") ~ "cestode",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CILI") ~ "ciliate",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "COPE") ~ "copepod",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "LEECH") ~ "leech",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "META") ~ "trematode_metacercaria",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MONO") ~ "monogenean",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYX") ~ "myxozoan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYXO") ~ "myxozoan",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NEM") ~ "nematode",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NMORPH") ~ "nematomorph",
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "TREM") ~ "trematode",
    TRUE ~ NA
  ))

full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(psite_abundance = case_when(
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACAN") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "ACANTH") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CEST") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "CILI") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "COPE") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "LEECH") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "META") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MONO") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NEM") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "NMORPH") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "TREM") ~ psite_count,
    TRUE ~ NA
  ))

full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(psite_prevalence = case_when(
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYX") ~ psite_count,
    str_detect(fish_psite_combo, "MYXO") ~ psite_count,
    TRUE ~ NA
  ))

full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(paste(year_collected, month_collected, day_collected, sep = "-"))) 

SPI_data <- SPI_data %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

full_data <- full_data %>% 
  mutate(psite_prevalence = as.integer(psite_prevalence))

full_data <- full_data %>% 
  left_join(SPI_data, by = "date")

# view(table(full_data$category))



# create an offset variable for the issue of total_length_mm and parasite_abundance

```

# Hurricane analysis and data prepping
### Controls 
Find the average date of a hurricane, so that we can identify when the average hurricane starts and stops and how long it lasts -- this will be used to assign a period of time to our hurricane controls. [This code was used to identify these information, but no longer needs to be run for the analysis to work]. Then, pick out the years in which there was no hurricane, so that we can identify which years to assign as control in our hurricane analysis. 
```{r control assignment to dataframe, eval=FALSE}
average_hurr <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  filter(str_detect(ewe_type, "hurricane")) %>%
  mutate(
    month = month(date),
    day = day(date)
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    average_month = mean(month),
    average_day = mean(day)
  )
# average hurricane happens on 9/18 each year
# find average duration of hurricane event
# Define date ranges for hurricane events
hurricane_events <- data.frame(
  start_date = as.Date(c("1969-08-14", "1971-09-05", "1988-09-08", 
                         "1992-08-16", "2004-09-02", "1964-09-28", 
                         "1965-08-27", "1974-08-29", "1995-09-27", 
                         "1998-09-15", "2002-09-21", "1985-08-28", 
                         "2004-09-14", "1979-07-09", "1985-08-12", 
                         "1985-10-26", "1988-09-07", "1997-07-16")),
  end_date = as.Date(c("1969-08-22", "1971-09-15", "1988-09-19", 
                       "1992-08-19", "2004-09-25", "1964-10-05", 
                       "1965-09-13", "1974-09-10", "1995-10-06", 
                       "1998-10-01", "2002-10-04", "1985-09-04", 
                       "2004-09-27", "1979-07-16", "1985-08-20", 
                       "1985-11-03", "1988-09-11", "1997-07-27"))
)

# Calculate durations of each hurricane event
hurricane_events$duration <- as.numeric(hurricane_events$end_date - hurricane_events$start_date)
# Calculate the average duration
average_duration <- mean(hurricane_events$duration)
# Print result
average_duration
# average is 10 days
# years in which there was no hurricane: 1963, 1966, 1967, 1968, 1970, 1972, 1973, 1975, 1976, 1977, 1978, 1980, 1981, 1982, 1983, 1984, 1986, 1987, 1989, 1990, 1991, 1993, 1994, 1999, 2000, 2003
```

### Hurricane events
Add actual hurricane timeline parameters for 6 month (6 month meaning a buffer period of 6 months before a hurricane [denoted as pre] and 6 months after a hurricane [denoted post]). These dates for hurricane occurance are taken from the [NOAA hurricane watch website](https://coast.noaa.gov/hurricanes/#map=3.51/28.21/-61.45&) and represent all hurricane events that crossed a 50 mile boundary of the Pearl River from source to sea. 
```{r hurricane event assignment to df}
hurricane_df6 <- full_data %>%
  mutate(ewe_type = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1969-02-14") & date <= as.Date("1969-08-14") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1969-08-14") & date <= as.Date("1969-08-22") ~ "hurricane_5", #camille
    date >= as.Date("1969-08-22") & date <= as.Date("1970-02-22") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-03-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-09-05") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1971-09-05") & date <= as.Date("1971-09-15") ~ "hurricane_5", #edith
    date >= as.Date("1971-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1972-03-15") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-02-16") & date <= as.Date("1992-08-16") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("1992-08-16") & date <= as.Date("1992-08-19") ~ "hurricane_5", #andrew
    date >= as.Date("1992-08-19") & date <= as.Date("1993-03-19") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-03-02") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-02") ~ "pre_5",
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-02") & date <= as.Date("2004-09-25") ~ "hurricane_5", #ivan -- external
    date >= as.Date("2004-09-25") & date <= as.Date("2005-03-25") ~ "post_5",
    date >= as.Date("1964-03-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-09-28") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1964-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-10-05") ~ "hurricane_4", #hilda
    date >= as.Date("1964-10-05") & date <= as.Date("1965-04-05") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-02-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-08-27") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1965-08-27") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-13") ~ "hurricane_4", #betsy
    date >= as.Date("1965-09-13") & date <= as.Date("1966-03-13") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-02-28") & date <= as.Date("1974-08-29") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1974-08-29") & date <= as.Date("1974-09-10") ~ "hurricane_4", #carmen -- external
    date >= as.Date("1974-09-10") & date <= as.Date("1975-03-10") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-03-15") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-15") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-15") & date <= as.Date("1998-10-01") ~ "hurricane_4", #georges
    date >= as.Date("1998-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1999-04-01") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-03-21") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-21") ~ "pre_4",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-21") & date <= as.Date("2002-10-04") ~ "hurricane_4", #lili -- external 
    date >= as.Date("2002-10-04") & date <= as.Date("2003-04-04") ~ "post_4",
    date >= as.Date("1985-02-28") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-28") ~ "pre_3",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-28") & date <= as.Date("1985-09-04") ~ "hurricane_3", #elena
    date >= as.Date("1985-09-04") & date <= as.Date("1986-03-04") ~ "post_3",
    date >= as.Date("2002-03-14") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-14") ~ "pre_3",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-14") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-27") ~ "hurricane_3", #isidore 
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-27") & date <= as.Date("2003-03-27") ~ "post_3",
    date >= as.Date("1979-01-09") & date <= as.Date("1979-07-09") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1979-07-09") & date <= as.Date("1979-07-16") ~ "hurricane_1", #bob
    date >= as.Date("1979-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1980-01-16") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-02-12") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-12") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-12") & date <= as.Date("1985-08-20") ~ "hurricane_1", #danny -- external
    date >= as.Date("1985-08-20") & date <= as.Date("1986-02-20") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-04-26") & date <= as.Date("1985-10-26") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1985-10-26") & date <= as.Date("1985-11-03") ~ "hurricane_1", #juan
    date >= as.Date("1985-11-03") & date <= as.Date("1986-05-03") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-03-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-07") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-09-11") ~ "hurricane_1", #florence
    date >= as.Date("1988-09-11") & date <= as.Date("1989-03-11") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-01-16") & date <= as.Date("1997-07-16") ~ "pre_1",
    date >= as.Date("1997-07-16") & date <= as.Date("1997-07-27") ~ "hurricane_1", #danny
    date >= as.Date("1997-07-27") & date <= as.Date("1998-01-27") ~ "post_1",
    date >= as.Date("1988-02-07") & date <= as.Date("1988-08-07") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1988-08-08") & date <= as.Date("1988-08-10") ~ "tropical_storm", #beryl
    date >= as.Date("1988-08-11") & date <= as.Date("1989-02-11") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1998-03-26") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-26") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1998-09-27") & date <= as.Date("1998-09-30") ~ "tropical_storm", #hermine
    date >= as.Date("1998-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1999-04-01") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2000-12-05") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-05") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2001-06-05") & date <= as.Date("2001-06-20") ~ "tropical_storm", #allison
    date >= as.Date("2001-06-20") & date <= as.Date("2001-12-20") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-02-04") & date <= as.Date("2002-08-04") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-08-04") & date <= as.Date("2002-08-09") ~ "tropical_storm", #bertha
    date >= as.Date("2002-08-09") & date <= as.Date("2003-02-09") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-03-12") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-12") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-12") & date <= as.Date("2002-09-15") ~ "tropical_storm", #hanna
    date >= as.Date("2002-09-15") & date <= as.Date("2003-03-15") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2002-12-27") & date <= as.Date("2003-06-27") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("2003-06-28") & date <= as.Date("2003-07-03") ~ "tropical_storm", #bill
    date >= as.Date("2003-07-04") & date <= as.Date("2004-01-04") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1965-03-23") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-23") ~ "pre_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1965-09-24") & date <= as.Date("1965-09-30") ~ "tropical_storm", #debbie
    date >= as.Date("1965-10-01") & date <= as.Date("1966-04-01") ~ "post_ts",
    date >= as.Date("1995-01-30") & date <= as.Date("1995-07-30") ~ "pre_double",
    date >= as.Date("1995-07-31") & date <= as.Date("1995-10-06") ~ "hurricane_double", #opal (4) and erin (2) combined
    date >= as.Date("1995-10-07") & date <= as.Date("1996-04-07") ~ "post_double",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))


# make a new column for storm intensity

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(storm_intensity = case_when(
    str_detect(ewe_type, "1") ~ "one",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "2") ~ "two",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "3") ~ "three",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "4") ~ "four",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "5") ~ "five",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "ts") ~ "ts",
    str_detect(ewe_type, "double") ~ "double",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))


# create hurricane control categories just like with the other dataset by assigning non-event years to have a pre and post category -- 6 months

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(control = case_when(
    date >= as.Date("1963-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1963-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1963-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1963-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1963-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1964-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1966-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1966-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1966-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1967-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1967-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1967-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1967-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1968-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1968-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1968-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1968-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1968-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1968-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1969-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1970-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1970-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1971-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1972-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1972-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1972-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1972-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1972-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1973-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1973-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1973-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1973-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1974-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1975-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1975-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1976-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1976-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1976-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1976-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1977-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1977-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1977-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1978-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1978-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1978-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1978-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1979-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1980-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1980-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1980-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1981-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1981-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1981-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1981-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1981-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1981-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1982-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1982-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1982-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1982-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1983-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1983-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1983-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1983-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1984-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1987-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1987-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1987-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1988-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1989-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1989-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1990-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1990-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1990-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1990-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1991-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1991-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1991-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1991-09-28") & date <= as.Date("1992-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-03-18") & date <= as.Date("1999-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-09-18") & date <= as.Date("1999-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("1999-09-28") & date <= as.Date("2000-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-03-18") & date <= as.Date("2000-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-09-18") & date <= as.Date("2000-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("2000-09-28") & date <= as.Date("2001-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-03-18") & date <= as.Date("2003-09-18") ~ "pre_control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-09-18") & date <= as.Date("2003-09-28") ~ "control",
    date >= as.Date("2003-09-28") & date <= as.Date("2004-03-28") ~ "post_control",
    TRUE ~ "no event"
  ))

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(event = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_5" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_4" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_3" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_2" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_2" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_1" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "pre_double" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "post_double" ~ "hurricane",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "pre_control" ~ "control",
    ewe_type == "no event" & control == "post_control" ~ "control",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>%
  filter(event != "NA")

hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(timing = case_when(
    ewe_type == "pre_5" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_5" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_4" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_4" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_3" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_3" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_2" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_2" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_1" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_1" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_ts" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_ts" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "pre_double" ~ "pre",
    ewe_type == "post_double" ~ "post",
    control == "pre_control" ~ "pre",
    control == "post_control" ~ "post",
    ewe_type == "hurricane_4" ~ "during",
    TRUE ~ "NA"
  )) %>%
  filter(timing != "NA")


hurricane_df6 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  mutate(timing = factor(timing, levels = c("pre", "post"))) %>%
  mutate(timing = relevel(timing, ref = "pre")) %>% 
  mutate(event = factor(event, levels = c("hurricane", "control"))) %>%
  mutate(event = relevel(event, ref = "control")) #%>% 
 # mutate(psite_type = factor(psite_type, levels = c("trematode", "trematode_metacercaria", "monogenean", "myxozoan"))) %>% 
  #mutate(psite_type = relevel(psite_type, ref = "monogenean")) 

### what should be my reference level for psite_type? 
### how can i account for the other parasites that are removed from this analysis?

ewe_table6 <- table(hurricane_df6$event)
# view(ewe_table6)
ewe_table6_2 <- table(hurricane_df6$timing)
# view(ewe_table6_2)
```
Visualization and checking of data frame.
```{r head}
head(hurricane_df6)
```
Create a new df that only has parasite types that have high replication in the dataset [keep only trematode, metacercaria, myxozoan, monogenean, cilliate, and nematode]
```{r filtered}
# ===== filtering for abundance analysis ===== #
# drop low replicate categories
hurricane_df_abundance <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode", "trematode_metacercaria", "monogenean"))

# filter out all remaining NAs from the psite_abundance column --> there are some but shouldnt be 
hurricane_df_abundance <- hurricane_df_abundance %>%
  filter(!is.na(psite_abundance))

## i cut down to just monogenes, trematodes, and metacercaria in order for the model to work better, we can maybe do a model with just those little guys in small counts on their own?

# ===== filtering for prevalence analysis ===== #
# drop low replicate categories
hurricane_df_prevalence <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  filter(psite_type %in% c("myxozoan"))

# filter out all remaining NAs from the psite_prevalence column --> there are none
hurricane_df_prevalence <- hurricane_df_prevalence %>%
  filter(!is.na(psite_prevalence))

```
# Plots
Create color palette and assign faceting labels 
```{r color palette and facet labels, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
lacroix_palettes_list <- LaCroixColoR::lacroix_palettes
my_pal <- lacroix_palette("Pamplemousse", n = 5, type = "continuous")

parasite_order <- c(
  "trematode", "trematode_metacercaria", "myxozoan", "monogenean", "ciliate",
  "nematode", "acanthocephalan", "cestode", "copepod", "nematomorph"
)

parasite_labels <- c(
  "trematode" = "Trematode",
  "trematode_metacercaria" = "Metacercaria",
  "myxozoan" = "Myxozoan",
  "monogenean" = "Monogenean",
  "ciliate" = "Ciliate",
  "nematode" = "Nematode",
  "cestode" = "Cestode",
  "acanthocephalan" = "Acanthocephalan",
  "copepod" = "Copepod", 
  "nematomorph" = "Nematomorph"
)


storm_order <- c("five", "four", "three", "two", "one", "ts", "control")

storm_labels <- c(
  "five" = "5",
  "four" = "4",
  "three" = "3",
  "two" = "2",
  "one" = "1",
  "ts" = "TS", 
  "no event" = "control"
)

season_order <- c(
  "winter", "spring", "summer", "fall"
)

season_labels <- c(
  "winter" = "Winter",
  "spring" = "Spring", 
  "summer" = "Summer", 
  "fall" = "Fall"
)

timing_order <- c(
  "pre", "during", "post"
)

timing_labels <- c(
  "pre" = "Pre",
  "post" = "Post", 
  "control" = "During",
  "flood" = "During", 
  "drought" = "During"
)

event_labels <- c(
  "drought" = "drought", 
  "flood" = "flood"
)
```
Mutate the hurricane dataset so that the total sum of each type of parasite can be plotted. Designate average changes in parasitism by scaling parasite counts to the mean.
```{r sum to plot all parasites added together and scale to mean, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
hurricane_df6_sum <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  group_by(psite_type, year_collected, storm_intensity, event, timing) %>%
  summarize(total_psite_count = sum(psite_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  filter(total_psite_count != "0") %>%
  filter(!is.na(psite_type), 
         psite_type != "leech",
         psite_type != "nematomorph")

hurricane_df6_sum <- hurricane_df6_sum %>%
    mutate(psite_type = fct_relevel(psite_type, parasite_order))

hurricane_df6_sum <- hurricane_df6_sum %>%
    mutate(storm_intensity = fct_relevel(storm_intensity, storm_order))

hurricane_df6_sum <- hurricane_df6_sum %>%
    mutate(timing = fct_relevel(timing, timing_order))


## including zeroes
hurricane_df6_sum2 <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  group_by(psite_type, year_collected, storm_intensity, event, timing) %>%
  summarize(total_psite_count = sum(psite_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(!is.na(psite_type), 
         psite_type != "leech")

hurricane_df6_sum2 <- hurricane_df6_sum2 %>%
    mutate(psite_type = fct_relevel(psite_type, parasite_order))

hurricane_df6_sum2 <- hurricane_df6_sum2 %>%
    mutate(storm_intensity = fct_relevel(storm_intensity, storm_order))

hurricane_df6_sum2 <- hurricane_df6_sum2 %>%
    mutate(timing = fct_relevel(timing, timing_order))

# scale to mean 
sum(hurricane_df6_sum2$total_psite_count, na.rm = TRUE)
33422/868  # average rate of parasitism across all observations is 38.50461
# in this case, each categorical 0 is counted only once, so the sum of each category includes summing all the zeroes but if there is only zeroes in a category, then those will show up as zero

hurricane_df6_sum2 <- hurricane_df6_sum2 %>% 
  mutate(relative_count = total_psite_count - 39)

```
These are numerous plots in no particular order (to be refined at the conclusion of analyses)
```{r various plots, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# final plot for FISH 554
custom_y <- list(
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 3000), breaks = c(0, 1500, 3000)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1200), breaks = c(0, 600, 1200)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 600), breaks = c(0, 300, 600)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 400), breaks = c(0, 200, 400)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100), breaks = c(0, 50, 100)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 50), breaks = c(0, 25, 50)),  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = c(0, 10, 20)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 10), breaks = c(0, 5, 10)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2), breaks = c(0, 1, 2))
)

## by season
#ggplot(hurricane_df6_sum,
#       aes(x = storm_intensity, y = total_psite_count, fill = season)) + 
#  geom_col() + 
 # facet_wrap(~psite_type, labeller = labeller(psite_type = parasite_labels), scales = "free_y") +
 # theme(
 #   strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
 #   panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
 #   panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
#    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
#    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
#    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
#    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
#    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
#  ) +
#  ylab("Parasite Count") + 
#  xlab("Hurricane Category") + 
#  scale_fill_manual(
#  values = c("spring" = "#1BB6AF", "summer" = "#EA7580", "fall" = "#F6A1A5", "winter" = "#088BBE"), 
#  name = "",
#  labels = season_labels) +
 # scale_x_discrete(labels = storm_labels) +
#  facetted_pos_scales(y = custom_y)

## by timing 
custom_y_t <- list(
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1400), breaks = c(0, 700, 1400)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1000), breaks = c(0, 500, 1000)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 400), breaks = c(0, 200, 400)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 400), breaks = c(0, 200, 400)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60), breaks = c(0, 30, 60)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = c(0, 10, 20)),  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 12), breaks = c(0, 6, 12)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 4), breaks = c(0, 2, 4)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2), breaks = c(0, 1, 2))
)

ggplot(hurricane_df6_sum,
       aes(x = storm_intensity, y = total_psite_count, fill = timing)) + 
  geom_col(position = "dodge") + 
  facet_wrap(~ psite_type, labeller = labeller(psite_type = parasite_labels), scales = "free_y") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
  ) +
  ylab("Parasite Count") + 
  xlab("Hurricane Category") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("pre" = "#F28A8A", "post" = "#1BB6AF"), 
  name = "",
  labels = season_labels) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = storm_labels)

## by timing and event
custom_y_t2 <- list(
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 5000), breaks = c(0, 2500, 5000)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 8000), breaks = c(0, 4000, 8000)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 800), breaks = c(0, 400, 800)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 400), breaks = c(0, 200, 400)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 80), breaks = c(0, 40, 80)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 12), breaks = c(0, 6, 12)),  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 20), breaks = c(0, 00, 20)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 8), breaks = c(0, 4, 8)),
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2), breaks = c(0, 1, 2))
)

ggplot(hurricane_df6_sum,
       aes(x = event, y = total_psite_count, fill = timing)) + 
  geom_col(position = "dodge") + 
  facet_wrap(~ psite_type, labeller = labeller(psite_type = parasite_labels), scales = "free_y") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
  ) +
  ylab("Parasite Count") + 
  xlab("Timing") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("pre" = "#F28A8A", "post" = "#1BB6AF"), 
  name = "",
  labels = season_labels) #+
 # facetted_pos_scales(y = custom_y_t2)

## include year of collection
ggplot(hurricane_df6_sum,
       aes(x = year_collected, y = total_psite_count, color = timing)) + 
  geom_line(linejoin = "round") + 
  facet_wrap(~ psite_type, labeller = labeller(psite_type = parasite_labels), scales = "free_y") +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
  ) +
  ylab("Parasite Count") + 
  xlab("Timing") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("hurricane" = "#F28A8A", "control" = "#1BB6AF"), 
  name = "",
  labels = season_labels)


## include year of collection
ggplot(hurricane_df6_sum2,
       aes(x = year_collected, y = relative_count, fill = event)) + 
  geom_smooth(method = "loess",
              se = FALSE,
              formula = 'y ~ x',
              span = 0.8) +
  stat_smooth(se=FALSE, geom="area",
              method = 'loess', alpha=.5,
              span = 0.8,aes(fill=event)) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
  ) +
  ylab("Relative Parasite Count") + 
  xlab("Year Collected") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("hurricane" = "#F28A8A", "control" = "#1BB6AF"), 
  name = "",
  labels = season_labels) 

ggplot(hurricane_df6_sum2,
       aes(x = year_collected, y = relative_count, fill = event)) + 
  geom_col() +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
  ) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") +
  ylab("Relative Parasite Count") + 
  xlab("Year Collected") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("hurricane" = "#F28A8A", "control" = "#95C65C"), 
    name = "",
    labels = season_labels
  )

ggplot(hurricane_df6_sum,
       aes(x = timing, y = total_psite_count, fill = timing)) + 
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~ event) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey")
  ) +
  ylab("Parasite Count") + 
  xlab("Timing") + 
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = c("pre" = "#F28A8A", "post" = "#1BB6AF"), 
  name = "",
  labels = season_labels) 

# Plot frequency of different storm intensities 
view(table(hurricane_df6$storm_intensity))
# total number of storms: cat 5 = 4, cat 4 = 6, cat 3 = 2, cat 2 = 1, cat 1 = 5, ts = 7

ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = psite_abundance, y = psite_prevalence)) + 
         geom_point() + facet_wrap(~timing) +
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                         color = "darkgrey"),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("")

ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = storm_intensity, y = mean_streamflow)) + 
         geom_boxplot() + 
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                         color = "darkgrey"),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("")

ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = ewe_type, y = psite_count)) + 
         geom_col() + 
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                         color = "darkgrey"),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("")

ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = ewe_type, y = mean_streamflow)) + 
         geom_boxplot() + 
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                         color = "darkgrey"),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("")


ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = ewe_type, y = mean_temperature, fill = season)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + 
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "darkgrey"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")
  ) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal[1:5], name = '')

ggplot(hurricane_df6,
       aes(x = psite_count)) + 
         geom_histogram() + 
   theme(strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                         color = "darkgrey"),
         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
         panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
         panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
         panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines")) +
  ylab("") + 
  xlab("")

# remove non-comparable sites:
hdf_pp <- hurricane_df6 %>%
  filter(site != "CD",
         site != "CC", 
         site != "IB")

z <- ggplot(hdf_pp,
       aes(x = timing, y = mean_temperature, fill = timing)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + facet_grid(.~site) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "grey99"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"), 
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  ) +
  ylab("Mean Temperature (C)") + 
  xlab("Pre or Post Hurricane") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal[1:4], name = '', labels = pp_label)

x <- ggplot(hdf_pp,
       aes(x = timing, y = mean_streamflow, fill = timing)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + facet_grid(.~site) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "grey99"),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"), 
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  ) +
 ylab("Mean Streamflow (m³/s)") + 
  xlab("") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal[1:4], name = '', labels = pp_label) 

zx <- ggarrange(z, x, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "bottom", labels = c("A", "B"), align = "v", ncol = 1)

print(zx)

# Create and plot a timeline of hurricane events:
```

# Models
## Hurricane count (abundance)
```{r hurricane abundance}

# out of date structure
#summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x/parasite_taxonomic_group) + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|storm_intensity) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x/psite_spp_y),  data = hurricane_df_abundance, family = poisson)) # gives all NA

# zero inflated performance package
# truncated at lower / upper bounds and redistributes 
#aic useless [fixed effect covar], lrtest test random effects --- test overdispersion  (performace)

# different family

summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x),
                          data = hurricane_df_abundance, family = nbinom1(link = "log"), ziformula = ~ 1)) #AIC 11397

summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x),
                          data = hurricane_df_abundance, family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), ziformula = ~ 1)) #AIC 13248

summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x),
                          data = hurricane_df_abundance, family = truncated_nbinom2, ziformula = ~ 1)) #AIC 13569

summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x),
                          data = hurricane_df_abundance, family = nbinom2(link = "log"))) #AIC 11413


#### test truncated hurdle model --> truncated_nbinon1, 2 and poisson all return NAs 

# pairs plot / corr plot to test for correlation between factors 
# ci cannot be random effect
# test overd with chi2/df -- pearson redid2 /df > 1 
# check nbinom function to test for lambda
# nbinom vs trunc 
# zeroes vs non xeros 
# oredicting vs mechanisms 
# intercept re vs slope re (total_length) 
# run simple models first , additive model then multiplicative 
# hessian bad = overparameterized -- change optimizer
# poisson rate models -- turn counts into per mm of fish tissue -- offset will the offset log the output? counts per subset area 

# remove ci to a fixed effect, add an offset for total fish length
summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x), offset = log(total_length_mm),
                          data = hurricane_df_abundance, family = nbinom1(link = "log"), ziformula = ~ 1)) #AIC 11397


summary(hurricane_count <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                          data = hurricane_df_abundance, family = nbinom1(link = "log"), ziformula = ~ 1)) 


```
Create diagnostics.
```{r hurricane abundance diagnostics}
# diagnostics
#Evaluate residuals
s = simulateResiduals(fittedModel = hurricane_count, n = 250)
plot(s)

tab_model(s)

terms(hurricane_count)
# other possible diagnostics
#df <- ggpredict(hurricane_count, terms = "psite_abundance")
#plot(df)
#plot(df, show_data=TRUE)


# manually plot residuals 
# pair plots 
# draw out what each covariate means  
```

#### Checking all model options
- run each type and then run dHarma 
```{r}
## normal

# nbinom1 log

nbinom1log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# truncated_nbinom1 log

tnbinom1log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# truncated_nbinom1 sqrt

tnbinom1sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# truncated_nbinom2 log

tnbinom2log <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# truncated_nbinom2 sqrt

tnbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)


## offset

# nbinom1 log

nbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# truncated_nbinom1 log

tnbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# truncated_nbinom1 sqrt

tnbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# truncated_nbinom2 log

tnbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# truncated_nbinom2 sqrt

tnbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)

```

```{r}
summary(nbinom1log)
summary(nbinom1sqrt)
summary(nbinom2log)
summary(nbinom2sqrt)
summary(nbinom12log)
summary(nbinom12sqrt)
summary(tnbinom1log)
summary(tnbinom1sqrt)
summary(tnbinom2log)
summary(tnbinom12sqrt)
summary(nbinom1logoff)
summary(nbinom1sqrtoff)
summary(nbinom2logoff)
summary(nbinom2sqrtoff)
summary(nbinom12logoff)
summary(nbinom12sqrtoff)
summary(tnbinom1logoff)
summary(tnbinom1sqrtoff)
summary(tnbinom2logoff)
summary(tnbinom2sqrtoff)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom1log, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom1sqrt, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom2log, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom2sqrt, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom12log, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom12sqrt, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom1log, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom1sqrt, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom2log , plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom12sqrt, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom1logoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom1sqrtoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom2logoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom2sqrtoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom12logoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom12sqrtoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom1logoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom1sqrtoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom2logoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom2sqrtoff, plot = TRUE)



# List of all model objects
models <- list(
  nbinom1log, nbinom1sqrt, nbinom2log, nbinom2sqrt, nbinom12log, nbinom12sqrt,
  tnbinom1log, tnbinom1sqrt, tnbinom2log, tnbinom12sqrt,
  nbinom1logoff, nbinom1sqrtoff, nbinom2logoff, nbinom2sqrtoff,
  nbinom12logoff, nbinom12sqrtoff, tnbinom1logoff, tnbinom1sqrtoff,
  tnbinom2logoff, tnbinom2sqrtoff
)

# Model names
model_names <- c(
  "nbinom1log", "nbinom1sqrt", "nbinom2log", "nbinom2sqrt", "nbinom12log", "nbinom12sqrt",
  "tnbinom1log", "tnbinom1sqrt", "tnbinom2log", "tnbinom12sqrt",
  "nbinom1logoff", "nbinom1sqrtoff", "nbinom2logoff", "nbinom2sqrtoff",
  "nbinom12logoff", "nbinom12sqrtoff", "tnbinom1logoff", "tnbinom1sqrtoff",
  "tnbinom2logoff", "tnbinom2sqrtoff"
)

# Simulate residuals and extract diagnostics
residual_summaries <- map2_df(models, model_names, function(model, name) {
  sim <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    dispersion = testDispersion(sim)$p.value,
    uniformity = testUniformity(sim)$p.value,
    outliers = testOutliers(sim)$p.value,
    AIC = AIC(model)
  )
})

# View and sort by AIC (lower is better) and test stats (higher p-values indicate better fit)
residual_summaries %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  print()


# this model is the best fit
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom2log, plot = TRUE)
summary(nbinom2log)
plot(parameters(nbinom2log))

```




FROM ARIAL's CODE:
```{r}

# check zero inflation
table(hurricane_df_abundance$psite_abundance)
sum(hurricane_df_abundance$psite_abundance > 0)
sum(hurricane_df_abundance$psite_abundance < 1)

# check overdispertion likelyhood
mean(hurricane_df_abundance$psite_abundance)
var(hurricane_df_abundance$psite_abundance)

# check covariate levels:
levels(hurricane_df_abundance$event)
levels(hurricane_df_abundance$timing)
levels(hurricane_df_abundance$psite_type) # monogene is current reference level for psite_type

# try poisson model
hurricane_abundance_pois <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_poisson, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

summary(hurricane_abundance_pois)
plot(parameters(hurricane_abundance_pois))

# check overdispersion parameter manually (X2/df.resid) Overdispersed > 1
sum(residuals(hurricane_abundance_pois, type = "pearson")^2) / 10608 
# 96 = is overdispersed

# check residuals
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = hurricane_abundance_pois, plot = TRUE)

# Chi2 Goodness of fit test (null hypothesis = model is correctly specified)  
X2 <- sum((hurricane_df_abundance$psite_abundance - fitted(hurricane_abundance_pois))^2 / fitted(hurricane_abundance_pois))
df <- length(hurricane_df_abundance$psite_abundance) - length(coef(hurricane_abundance_pois))
pchisq(X2, df,lower.tail = FALSE)
# output is 0
# reject null- model not a good fit

# try negative binomial

#with offset

hurricane_abundance_nbin <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_abundance)


# negative binomial 1
hurricane_abundance_nbin <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# negative binomial 2
hurricane_abundance_nbin <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_abundance)

# truncated negative binomial 
hurricane_abundance_nbin <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ psite_type, 
                                family = truncated_nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_abundance)

summary(hurricane_abundance_nbin)
plot(parameters(hurricane_abundance_nbin))
plot_residuals(hurricane_abundance_nbin)

# check residuals
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = hurricane_abundance_nbin, plot = TRUE)

# comparing hurdle poisson and hurdle nb
# likelihood ratio test
print(lrtest(hurricane_abundance_pois, hurricane_abundance_nbin)) 
# nb is better model -- we reject the null that we should use a simple model and instead need to use a more complicated one 

# AIC
AICtab(hurricane_abundance_pois, hurricane_abundance_nbin)
# nb is better model (dAIC is smallest)

# calculate 95% CI
conf <- confint(hurricane_abundance_nbin)

###plot coefficients and CI
#zero-inflation (first part of hurdle- binomial)
# Create the dataframe
conf_df <- as.data.frame(conf) %>%
  rownames_to_column("variable") %>%
  rename(lower = `2.5 %`, upper = `97.5 %`) %>%
  mutate(estimate = conf[ , "Estimate"]) %>%
  select(variable, estimate, lower, upper) %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(lower * upper > 0, "yes", "no"))  # confidence interval does not cross 0

# filter out zi's to create conditional only and filter out NA's in sig (inf values)
conf_cond <- conf_df %>% 
  filter(str_starts(variable, "cond.")) %>% 
  filter(!is.infinite(upper)) %>% 
  filter(upper <= 5) # remove the one that is so huge

ggplot(data = conf_cond, aes(x = estimate, y = variable, color = sig)) +
  geom_point(size=3.5) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), lwd = 0.75) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, lwd = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-4, 4, by = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Coefficient", y = "Variable", color = "Significant") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 14)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red3","deepskyblue4"))

# filter out cond's to create zero inflated only and filter out NA's in sig (inf values)
conf_zi <- conf_df %>% 
  filter(str_starts(variable, "zi.")) %>% 
  filter(!is.infinite(upper)) %>% 
  filter(upper <= 5) # remove the one that is so huge

ggplot(data = conf_zi, aes(x = estimate, y = variable, color = sig)) +
  geom_point(size=3.5) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), lwd = 0.75) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, lwd = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-4, 4, by = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Coefficient", y = "Variable", color = "Significant") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 14)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red3","deepskyblue4"))

#############

# Get residuals and fitted values
residuals <- residuals(hurricane_abundance_nbin, type = "pearson")  # Pearson residuals
fitted_values <- fitted(hurricane_abundance_nbin)

# Plot residuals vs. fitted values
plot(fitted_values, residuals, main="Residuals vs Fitted Values",
     xlab="Fitted Values", ylab="Pearson Residuals", pch=20, col=rgb(0,0,0,0.5)) + 
abline(h=0, col="red")

```


### Model each parasite type alone -- only works for trematode + metas bc you cant do this analysis with only one category for comparison
```{r}
hdfa_trem <- hurricane_df_abundance %>%
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode", "trematode_metacercaria"))

# check zero inflation
table(hdfa_trem$psite_abundance)
sum(hdfa_trem$psite_abundance > 0)
sum(hdfa_trem$psite_abundance < 1)

# check overdispertion likelyhood
mean(hdfa_trem$psite_abundance)
var(hdfa_trem$psite_abundance)

# check covariate levels:
levels(hdfa_trem$event)
levels(hdfa_trem$timing)

# try poisson model
hdfa_trem_pois <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_poisson, data = hdfa_trem)

summary(hdfa_trem_pois)
plot(parameters(hdfa_trem_pois))

# check overdispersion parameter manually (X2/df.resid) Overdispersed > 1
sum(residuals(hdfa_trem_pois, type = "pearson")^2) / 10608 
# 78 = is overdispersed

# check residuals
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = hdfa_trem_pois, plot = TRUE)

# Chi2 Goodness of fit test (null hypothesis = model is correctly specified)  
X2 <- sum((hdfa_trem$psite_abundance - fitted(hdfa_trem_pois))^2 / fitted(hdfa_trem_pois))
df <- length(hdfa_trem$psite_abundance) - length(coef(hdfa_trem_pois))
pchisq(X2, df,lower.tail = FALSE)
# output is 0
# reject null- model not a good fit

# try negative binomial

hdfa_trem_nbin <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*psite_type + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom2, data = hdfa_trem)

summary(hdfa_trem_nbin)
plot(parameters(hdfa_trem_nbin))
plot_residuals(hdfa_trem_nbin)

# check residuals
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = hdfa_trem_nbin, plot = TRUE)

# comparing hurdle poisson and hurdle nb
# likelihood ratio test
print(lrtest(hdfa_trem_pois, hdfa_trem_nbin)) 
# output is confusing

# AIC
AICtab(hdfa_trem_pois, hdfa_trem_nbin)
# dAIC is NA

# calculate 95% CI
conf <- confint(hdfa_trem_nbin)

###plot coefficients and CI
#zero-inflation (first part of hurdle- binomial)
# Create the dataframe
conf_df <- as.data.frame(conf) %>%
  rownames_to_column("variable") %>%
  rename(lower = `2.5 %`, upper = `97.5 %`) %>%
  mutate(estimate = conf[ , "Estimate"]) %>%
  select(variable, estimate, lower, upper) %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(lower * upper > 0, "yes", "no"))  # confidence interval does not cross 0

# filter out zi's to create conditional only and filter out NA's in sig (inf values)
conf_cond <- conf_df %>% 
  filter(str_starts(variable, "cond.")) %>% 
  filter(!is.infinite(upper)) %>% 
  filter(upper <= 5) # remove the one that is so huge

ggplot(data = conf_cond, aes(x = estimate, y = variable, color = sig)) +
  geom_point(size=3.5) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), lwd = 0.75) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, lwd = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-4, 4, by = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Coefficient", y = "Variable", color = "Significant") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 14)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red3","deepskyblue4"))

# filter out cond's to create zero inflated only and filter out NA's in sig (inf values)
conf_zi <- conf_df %>% 
  filter(str_starts(variable, "zi.")) %>% 
  filter(!is.infinite(upper)) %>% 
  filter(upper <= 5) # remove the one that is so huge

ggplot(data = conf_zi, aes(x = estimate, y = variable, color = sig)) +
  geom_point(size=3.5) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper), lwd = 0.75) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, lwd = 0.5) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-4, 4, by = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Coefficient", y = "Variable", color = "Significant") +
  theme(text = element_text(family = "serif", size = 14)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("red3","deepskyblue4"))

```













## Hurricane prevalence (presence/absence for myxozoans) [not currently working]
```{r hurricane prevalence, echo=FALSE}
summary(hurricane_prevalence <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing*psite_type + (total_length_mm|fish_sp_x/parasite_taxonomic_group) + (1|ci/catalog_number) + (1|storm_intensity) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_y/psite_spp_y), 
                      data = hurricane_df_prevalence, family = binomial(link = "logit"), ziformula = ~ 1)) 

# diagnostics
#Evaluate residuals
s = simulateResiduals(fittedModel = hurricane_prevalence, n = 250)
s$scaledResiduals
plot(s)
```

## prevalence
```{r}
# nbinom1 log

nbinom1log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (1|total_length_mm),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (1|total_length_mm), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)
# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# truncated_nbinom1 log

tnbinom1log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# truncated_nbinom1 sqrt

tnbinom1sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# truncated_nbinom2 log

tnbinom2log <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# truncated_nbinom2 sqrt

tnbinom12sqrt <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) +
                                  (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)


## offset

# nbinom1 log

nbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom1 sqrt

nbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom2 log

nbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom2 sqrt

nbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# nbinom12 log

nbinom12logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

#nbinom12 sqrt

nbinom12sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# truncated_nbinom1 log

tnbinom1logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom1, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# truncated_nbinom1 sqrt

tnbinom1sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom1(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# truncated_nbinom2 log

tnbinom2logoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(log(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom2, data = hurricane_df_prevalence)

# truncated_nbinom2 sqrt

tnbinom2sqrtoff <- glmmTMB(psite_prevalence ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + 
                                  (1|fish_sp_x) + offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = truncated_nbinom2(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df_prevalence)
```

```{r}
summary(nbinom1log)
summary(nbinom1sqrt)
summary(nbinom2log)
summary(nbinom2sqrt)
summary(nbinom12log)
summary(nbinom12sqrt)
summary(tnbinom1log)
summary(tnbinom1sqrt)
summary(tnbinom2log)
summary(tnbinom12sqrt)
summary(nbinom1logoff)
summary(nbinom1sqrtoff)
summary(nbinom2logoff)
summary(nbinom2sqrtoff)
summary(nbinom12logoff)
summary(nbinom12sqrtoff)
summary(tnbinom1logoff)
summary(tnbinom1sqrtoff)
summary(tnbinom2logoff)
summary(tnbinom2sqrtoff)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom1log, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom1sqrt, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom2log, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom2sqrt, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom12log, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom12sqrt, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom1log, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom1sqrt, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom2log , plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom12sqrt, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom1logoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom1sqrtoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom2logoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom2sqrtoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom12logoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = nbinom12sqrtoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom1logoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom1sqrtoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom2logoff, plot = TRUE)
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom2sqrtoff, plot = TRUE)



# List of all model objects
models <- list(
  nbinom1log, nbinom1sqrt, nbinom2log, nbinom2sqrt, nbinom12log, nbinom12sqrt,
  tnbinom1log, tnbinom1sqrt, tnbinom2log, tnbinom12sqrt,
  nbinom1logoff, nbinom1sqrtoff, nbinom2logoff, nbinom2sqrtoff,
  nbinom12logoff, nbinom12sqrtoff, tnbinom1logoff, tnbinom1sqrtoff,
  tnbinom2logoff, tnbinom2sqrtoff
)

# Model names
model_names <- c(
  "nbinom1log", "nbinom1sqrt", "nbinom2log", "nbinom2sqrt", "nbinom12log", "nbinom12sqrt",
  "tnbinom1log", "tnbinom1sqrt", "tnbinom2log", "tnbinom12sqrt",
  "nbinom1logoff", "nbinom1sqrtoff", "nbinom2logoff", "nbinom2sqrtoff",
  "nbinom12logoff", "nbinom12sqrtoff", "tnbinom1logoff", "tnbinom1sqrtoff",
  "tnbinom2logoff", "tnbinom2sqrtoff"
)

# Simulate residuals and extract diagnostics
residual_summaries <- map2_df(models, model_names, function(model, name) {
  sim <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    dispersion = testDispersion(sim)$p.value,
    uniformity = testUniformity(sim)$p.value,
    outliers = testOutliers(sim)$p.value,
    AIC = AIC(model)
  )
})

# View and sort by AIC (lower is better) and test stats (higher p-values indicate better fit)
residual_summaries %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  print()


# this model is the best fit
simulateResiduals(fittedModel = tnbinom2logoff, plot = TRUE)
summary(tnbinom2logoff)
plot(parameters(tnbinom2logoff))

```


# TO REVISIT 

```{r}
mydf <- ggpredict(model, terms = c("a", "b"))

plot(mydf, show_data = TRUE, show_residuals = FALSE, jitter = 0.1, color = c("#")) + labs() + theme()
```
